## Summary
Brief description of the change and its motivation.

## Type of change
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / config / CI
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructuring, no functional change

## Checklist
- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] Analytical honesty: any figures added match the real dataset
- [ ] Synthetic data (if any) is labeled as such and generated by a reproducible script
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
